documentName.description: REQUIRED. Document/file name or partial name (Salesforce Files title) to search for. Example: 'contract', 'Q1 proposal'.

linkedRecordId.description: Optional. If provided, only return documents linked to this record (e.g., an Account, Opportunity, or Case). Must be a valid Salesforce Id like '001...', '006...', '500...'.

limit.description: Optional. Maximum number of documents to return. Default is 10.
